creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->murray

Stallion has agreed to send us an EasyIO 4-port board so that we can get these devices better supported under modern versions of FreeBSD.  I am working with Stallion engineers, and the PR originators to close all of these Stallion PRs in time for FreeBSD 4.4.
